g.title: booking.resource_type:owner->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.resource_type:record->biblio.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (record) REFERENCES biblio.record_entry(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.reservation:target_resource_type->booking.resource_type:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (target_resource_type) REFERENCES booking.resource_type(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.resource:type->booking.resource_type:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (type) REFERENCES booking.resource_type(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.resource_attr:resource_type->booking.resource_type:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (resource_type) REFERENCES booking.resource_type(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
